title: Odd Even Linked List
input_format: The head of a singly linked list.
output_format: The reordered list with all odd-indexed nodes first, followed by all even-indexed nodes.
constraints:
- The number of nodes in the linked list is in the range `[0, 10^4]`.
- `-10^6 <= Node.val <= 10^6`
function_signature: function oddEvenList(head: ListNode | null): ListNode | null {}
